overview.title: Team Overview
overview.description: Manage collaborative agent teams, track provisioned roles, and open each team workspace from here.

create.title: Create TeamSkill Team
create.description: Import a TeamSkill package and create a managed team from the leader, roles, and workflow defined by the package.
create.modalDescription: Select a TeamSkill package. Matcha will check its identity and dependencies before creating or replacing a team.
create.packagePathPlaceholder: Select or enter a TeamSkill directory or archive path
create.teamSkillDefinitionDescription: The package is the source of truth for the leader, roles, workflow, and dependencies. One TeamSkill name/version can only have one team instance.
create.existingTeamDetected: This TeamSkill version already has a team. Open the existing team instead of creating a duplicate.
create.versionChangeDescription: Current version {{currentVersion}} will be replaced by {{incomingVersion}}. The team row is kept and old run history is cleared.
create.confirmReplacement: I understand this will replace the current TeamSkill version for this team.
create.requiredDependencyBlocker: Required dependencies are missing. Resolve required skills or configure required tools before continuing.
create.noAutomaticInstallSource: This source is not a ClawHub install source. Open it, download the Skill, then import it locally.

run.emptyRuns: No runs yet. Create a run, then open the leader session and send a message to run it.
run.createFirstRunHint: This team has no run yet. Create a run, then open the leader session and send a message.
run.emptyWorkflow: Leader has not submitted a workflow plan yet

dependencyMissing.title: Dependencies required before this run can continue
dependencyMissing.description: Required dependencies cannot be bypassed. Install missing skills or configure missing tools, then retry the dependency check.
dependencyMissing.noAutomaticInstallSource: This source is not a ClawHub install source. Open it, download the Skill, then import it locally.
dependencyMissing.requiredToolBlocker: Required tools must be configured in OpenClaw before this run can continue.
dependencyMissing.retryAfterInstall: Retry after installing missing dependency skills.
dependencyMissing.retryNote: Retry dependency preflight after resolving dependencies.
dependencyMissing.abortNote: Abort due to unresolved TeamSkill dependencies.
